# OhMyOpenSource! - Bug Report

This is the `bug_report.md` issue template used across OhMyOpenSource! repositories. Place it at `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md`.

See [Issue Tracking](../project/issue-tracking) for the full conventions around writing and managing issues.

---

## Template

```markdown
---
name: Bug report
about: Report broken or incorrect behavior
labels: bug, status:needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what is broken. -->

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

<!-- What should happen. -->

## Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happens. Include error messages, logs or screenshots if relevant. -->

## Environment

- OS:
- Browser / runtime version:
- Project version / commit:

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related issues, pull requests, or any other relevant context. -->
```
